source_text: The gas can is minimum 25 cm wide $\times 25 \mathrm{~cm}$ deep $\times 35 \mathrm{~cm}$ high, with a 25 cm spout at the top IC.5.4.8 The filler neck must have a fuel cap that can withstand severe vibrations or high pressures such as could occur during a vehicle rollover event # IC.5.5 Fuel Tank Filling IC.5.5.1 Fueling / Refueling policies and procedures are at the discretion of the fuel crew and officials
